stemHtml:
Which of these statements about the limiting value of 5 degrees bank angle during VMCA determination are correct or incorrect?

I. When the bank angle is decreased from 5 degrees to 0 degrees, the value of VMCA will remain approximately constant.
II. At any bank angle above 5 degrees, VMCA will decrease correspondingly.

options.a: I is correct, II is incorrect.
options.b: I is incorrect, II is incorrect.
options.c: I is incorrect, II is correct.
options.d: I is correct, II is correct.
